sections.paragraph:
Original: נכר

Transliteration: nêkâr

Phonetic: nay-kawr'

BDB Definition:

  1. foreign, alien, foreignness, that which is foreign
    1. foreignness, foreign gods
    2. alien, foreigner
    3. foreign (vanities)

Origin: from H5234

TWOT entry: 1368b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
